examples.note: one keyword token → hybrid_text (BM25 + fuzzy), no vector. Top hit: Brandon Sanderson.
misspelled → hybrid_text; the fuzzy legs still surface Brandon Sanderson.
a few words → fused: keyword ⊕ semantic, merged by RRF. Top hit: Harry Potter.
a title → fused: BM25 over the words plus semantic neighbours. Tolkien, top to bottom.

examples.text: a lonely robot learning what it means to be human
examples.note: long natural language → semantic: ANN over descriptions. Top hit: I, Robot.
